title: Because I Met You
overview: After a bad experience in junior high, where her social anxiety was worsened by bullying, Uka Ishimori decides to change herself and the way she lives her life. Her first step is applying to Hachimitsu High School. Its attractions? A more relaxed school atmosphere, and the gruff but handsome Kai Miura.

title: Turning Into a Treasure
overview: Uka displays some hidden talents that even she didn't know about. Meanwhile, Kai is being strangely mean to her her for some reason... Is it a misguided attempt to keep her safe?

title: Our Little Secret
overview: Uka's happier than she ever dreamed. It's all new friends and new miracles until an incident on a school trip.

title: However Distant We May Be
overview: Uka struggles to open up to her class about her past. A friend of Kai's undermines her confidence further.

title: A Great Person
overview: Uka has a revelation about her own psychology thanks to Serina, Kai's ex-girlfriend.

title: In the Future, Too...
overview: Uka and her friends are working hard on the culture festival. She's determined to make their café a success!

title: I’m Sorry I Love Him
overview: Uka and Serina struggle to open up about their feelings. Can they figure it out over summer break?

title: Summon the Courage
overview: It's summer break! Uka, Serina, and Kai all summon their courage and communicate.

title: Goodbye, Bumbling Self
overview: Uka's father is concerned about Hachimitsu High again. Can he be convinced that it's the right place for her?

title: The Side of You No One Knows
overview: Uka ponders the nature of her relationship with Kai. What are they to each other?

title: Feelings Burst Free
overview: Everyone in Uka's class is discussing love. Is it better to hide your feelings, or let them fly free?

title: Honey Lemon Soda
overview: Uka and Kai try to figure out the new development in their relationship... as the whole school watches.
